chunks.title: Jeremiah Imprisoned and Judged
chunks.reason: Narrative account of Pashhur's punishment of Jeremiah followed by a prophetic oracle against him.

chunks.title: Jeremiah's Lament and Trust
chunks.reason: First-person speech expressing the prophet's struggle with his calling and confidence in God's deliverance.

chunks.title: Jeremiah's Curse on His Birth
chunks.reason: Intense personal lament cursing the day of his birth and questioning his existence.
